title: rootnode-repo-hygiene Profile
description: Profile configuration for the rootnode-repo-hygiene Skill. Defines which categories to scan, which cross-category passes to run, and how Phase 2 composes with rootnode-critic-gate and rootnode-cc-design REMEDIATE.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for IDE tooling. Profile validation ignores this field.

name.description: Optional human-readable profile name for self-documentation. Not consumed by Phase 1 or Phase 2 logic.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the profile's intent. Not consumed by Phase 1 or Phase 2 logic.

categories.description: Sweep categories to scan during Phase 1. Categories 1-10 are executable in Phase 2; categories 11-14 are recommendation-only and route to rootnode-cc-design REMEDIATE mode.

include_seven_layer_leak_check.description: When true, Phase 1 runs the cross-category 7-layer placement leak check after the category sweep. Leak findings (L-{n}) route to REMEDIATE alongside Cat 11-14 findings.

include_commit_plan.description: When true, Phase 1 produces a Recommended commit plan section (Options A/B/C plus defer-to-downstream detection). Phase 2 executes the chosen plan after batches complete.

critic_gate_threshold.description: Phase 2 composition with rootnode-critic-gate. 'required' halts Phase 2 entry if critic-gate is not installed; every batch goes through critic review. 'optional' allows per-batch user choice when critic-gate is installed.

remediate_routing.description: When true, Phase 1 produces a 'Routing recommendations' section naming structural findings (Cat 11-14 + leaks) for rootnode-cc-design REMEDIATE handoff. When false, structural findings remain in the report without an automated downstream pathway.

bootstrap_heritage.description: Bootstrap heritage carve-out for Cat 1 calibration. When present, Cat 1 lists inherited files in an inventory subsection and surfaces findings only under sharpened conditions (modified-recently, in-engine references, etc.). When absent or empty, Cat 1 runs without calibration.

inherited_files.description: Explicit list of file paths inherited from the parent project (relative to repo root).

inherited_directories.description: Glob patterns identifying directories or file groups inherited from the parent project.

package_json_name.description: Parent project's package.json name field. Used to detect identity-string carryover.

modified_recently_threshold.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Inherited files modified after this date are surfaced as findings. Files modified at or before this date are treated as unmodified inherited content.

parent_project_name.description: Parent project name as used in documentation and code references. Used to detect string-level identity carryover.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence tier to surface in the report. 'high' suppresses medium and low; 'medium' suppresses low; 'low' surfaces all. Cat 14 candidates are not subject to this filter (they carry complexity, not confidence).

cat_14_extension_pass.description: When true, Cat 14 runs an extension pass after the main scan: cross-candidate dependency analysis, order-of-build recommendation, and a single 'build this first' recommendation. Used by deep-audit; opt-in for custom profiles.
